workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate
instructions: Run steps 1→5 for each article in recommended order.
Copy keyword id from step 1 into step 2.
Copy page id from step 2 into steps 3–5.
The keyword notes field is the content brief for the AI pipeline.
recommendedPublishOrder: 3 — Add-on treatments (trust builder, links to cost pages)

pages.title: The Future of Fertility: How AI & Genetic Screening are Changing IVF in 2026
pages.goal: Establish site as modern, tech-forward authority

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: Tech-forward authority article (~1,800 words). Focus: how AI and genetic screening are changing IVF in 2026. REQUIRED H2s: (1) How AI Is Transforming the IVF Lab in 2026, (2) AI-Driven Embryo Selection: What Morphokinetic Analysis Actually Does, (3) Predictive Modeling for Successful Implantation, (4) Advanced PGT-A Screening: Reducing Chromosomal Errors, (5) Time-Lapse Incubators Explained for Patients, (6) What This Means If You Have Had Failed Cycles, (7) Which European Clinics Are Leading on AI-Assisted IVF, (8) What to Ask Your Clinic About Lab Technology, (9) FAQ. Link to /guides/ivf-success-rates-by-age-2026, /guides/ivf-after-45-guide-2026, /guides/advanced-maternal-age-clinic-questions, country guides. YMYL: cite peer-reviewed sources (ESHRE, ASRM), distinguish proven vs emerging tech. Goal: modern tech-forward authority.

body.title: The Future of Fertility: How AI & Genetic Screening Are Changing IVF in 2026
body.metaTitle: AI & Genetic Screening in IVF 2026 — Patient Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: AI embryo selection, PGT-A screening, and time-lapse incubators explained. What new lab technology means for patients with previous failed IVF cycles.

pages.title: IVF vs. Natural Conception at 40+: A Comparative Medical Analysis
pages.goal: Guide indecisive users to data-driven choice before fertility declines

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: Evidence-based decision guide (~1,800 words). Tone: blunt, honest, compassionate. Focus: IVF vs natural conception at 40+. REQUIRED H2s: (1) The Real Question: One More Natural Cycle or IVF with PGT-A?, (2) Age-Related Decline in Egg Quality: What Changes After 40, (3) The Biological Clock Reality Check, (4) Live Birth Rates by Age: Natural vs IVF (comparison table), (5) Why Time Is Your Most Valuable Asset, (6) When IVF with PGT-A Makes Medical Sense, (7) When Waiting May Still Be Reasonable, (8) How to Decide With Your Doctor, (9) FAQ. Link to /guides/ivf-after-45-guide-2026, /guides/ivf-success-rates-by-age-2026, /guides/advanced-maternal-age-clinic-questions. YMYL: cite CDC/ESHRE age-band statistics. Goal: data-driven choice before potential declines further.

body.title: IVF vs. Natural Conception at 40+: A Comparative Medical Analysis
body.metaTitle: IVF vs Natural Conception After 40 — Data Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Evidence-based comparison of live birth rates: natural conception vs IVF with PGT-A after 40. Age, egg quality, and why time matters most.

pages.title: Understanding Add-on Treatments: Are They Worth the Extra Cost?
pages.goal: Build trust by saving patients money and avoiding unnecessary treatments

body.keyword: ivf add on treatments worth it
body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: Objective add-on review (~1,800 words). Focus: IVF add-ons clinics upsell. REQUIRED H2s: (1) What Are IVF Add-On Treatments?, (2) Add-Ons With Strong Evidence: PGT-A and Embryo Glue, (3) Add-Ons With Mixed or Limited Evidence, (4) Still Experimental: Endometrial Scratching and Intralipid Infusions, (5) How to Talk to Your Doctor About Medical Necessity, (6) How to Spot Marketing Fluff vs Clinical Evidence, (7) Typical Add-On Costs in Europe (table), (8) MedCover Patient Reports on Hidden Add-Ons, (9) FAQ. Link to /costs/spain-ivf-cost-2026, /costs/greece-ivf-cost-2026, /guides/ai-genetic-screening-ivf-2026, country guides. Cite Cochrane/ESHRE where possible. Goal: extreme trust — save money, avoid unnecessary treatments.

body.title: Understanding Add-On Treatments: Are They Worth the Extra Cost?
body.metaTitle: IVF Add-On Treatments — What's Worth It? | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Objective review of IVF add-ons: PGT-A, Embryo Glue, endometrial scratching, and Intralipid. Evidence vs marketing, costs, and questions for your doctor.

pages.title: Your IVF Abroad Travel Insurance Guide: What Is Actually Covered?
pages.goal: Solve traveler anxiety with practical high-conversion resource

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: Practical insurance guide (~1,800 words). Focus: travel insurance for IVF abroad — what is actually covered. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why Standard Travel Insurance Fails IVF Patients, (2) What Complications Insurance Covers (OHSS hospitalization, etc.), (3) Emergency Medical Return Coverage Explained, (4) Specialized Fertility Insurance Providers to Know, (5) What to Check Before You Buy a Policy, (6) Country-Specific Considerations (Spain, Greece, Turkey, Czech Republic), (7) How Much Fertility Travel Insurance Costs, (8) Pre-Trip Insurance Checklist (table), (9) FAQ. Link to /guides/solo-ivf-journey-international-patients, all country guides, cost pages. Note: not legal/financial advice disclaimer. Goal: protect investment, reduce booking anxiety.

body.title: Your IVF Abroad Travel Insurance Guide: What Is Actually Covered?
body.metaTitle: IVF Abroad Travel Insurance — What's Covered? | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Standard travel insurance won't cover IVF complications. OHSS hospitalization, emergency returns, and specialized fertility insurance — what you need before you fly.

pages.title: The Impact of Lifestyle on IVF Outcomes: A 3-Month Pre-Treatment Plan
pages.goal: Capture planning-stage users early in the funnel

body.keyword: ivf lifestyle pre treatment plan 90 days
body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template: 90-day preparation guide (~1,800 words). Focus: lifestyle optimization 3 months before IVF stimulation. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why 90 Days Matters for Egg and Uterine Health, (2) Month 1: Baseline Habits and Medical Check-In, (3) Month 2: Supplement Protocols (CoQ10, Vitamin D, Prenatal Vitamins), (4) Month 3: Final Optimization Before Stimulation, (5) Diet: Mediterranean-Style Eating for Fertility, (6) Reducing Environmental Toxins (Plastics, Endocrine Disruptors), (7) Stress Management and Sleep, (8) What Lifestyle Changes Cannot Fix (honest limits), (9) FAQ. Link to /guides/ivf-vs-natural-conception-40-plus, /guides/ivf-after-45-guide-2026, country guides. YMYL: medical reviewer, cite evidence for supplements. Goal: engage users planning but not yet booked.

body.title: The Impact of Lifestyle on IVF Outcomes: A 3-Month Pre-Treatment Plan
body.metaTitle: IVF Pre-Treatment Plan — 90-Day Lifestyle Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: Optimize egg quality and uterine health 90 days before IVF: supplements, Mediterranean diet, toxin reduction, and stress management. Evidence-based prep plan.
